rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Powershell Cmdlets
id: b3dfac86-1056-4b6b-9c67-db4a10a9e812
status: experimental
description: Looks for look for cmdlets, methods, and switches that may indicate malicious
  activity. Inspired by the 2022 Red Canary Threat Detection report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/powershell/
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2022/11/03
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059
- attack.t1059.001
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \powershell.exe
    CommandLine|contains|windash:
    - -nop
    - -noni
    - invoke-expression
    - iex
    - downloadstring
    - downloadfile
    - downloadata
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
